name: TUKA Dubai
suggested_pitch: Adding a WhatsApp button and persistent top nav could help visitors browse and reach you faster.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for tukadubai.com

Hi,

I came across TUKA Dubai while researching furniture package providers in Dubai. Your room-set photography and package-based approach stand out — it's a smart way to sell.

Two things I noticed that might be leaving enquiries on the table: the main navigation is hidden behind a hamburger menu, so visitors can't browse categories at a glance, and there's no WhatsApp button for the quick chat that UAE customers expect.

A persistent top nav and a floating WhatsApp icon are small changes that could noticeably increase enquiries from first-time visitors.

Would you be open to a free 15-minute walkthrough of these quick improvements?

Best regards
message_linkedin: Hi — I looked at tukadubai.com and your furniture packages are really well presented. Two quick things: the navigation is hidden behind a hamburger icon so visitors can't browse easily, and there's no WhatsApp button for instant contact. Both are small fixes that could drive more enquiries. Happy to walk through specifics if useful.

name: Empire Furniture UAE
suggested_pitch: A cleaner color palette and streamlined homepage layout would let your product range shine more clearly.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for empirefurniture.ae

Hi,

I was looking at furniture retailers in Dubai and came across Empire Furniture. You clearly have a strong product range and your WhatsApp contact is a smart touch for the local market.

One thing I noticed is that the homepage has several competing sale banners which can overwhelm visitors before they find what they need. Also, the bold yellow/gold color scheme may be pulling attention away from the products themselves.

A calmer palette and a single focused hero banner could help visitors stay longer and convert more browsing into buying.

Would a free 15-minute walkthrough of a few layout tweaks be helpful?

Best regards
message_linkedin: Hi — I checked out empirefurniture.ae and your product range is impressive. I noticed the homepage has several competing sale banners and a bold color scheme that may distract from the products. A cleaner layout with one focused hero section could help convert more visitors. Happy to share specifics in a quick call.
